findings.message: $ARGUMENTS interpolated unquoted into `npx designlang battle $ARGUMENTS`; shell metacharacters in user input (semicolon, pipe, backtick) allow arbitrary command execution
Command declares no allowed-tools frontmatter field; any tool may be invoked without declared scope

Post-run flow has at least four distinct steps (run → read markdown → present summary → offer follow-ups) described in prose with bullet lists rather than numbered steps
"tight summary" — "tight" is a vague descriptor that does not specify length, format, or content requirements

Command declares no allowed-tools frontmatter field; any tool may be invoked without declared scope
Post-run flow (read index → tell user which file to open → offer --open) is described in a single prose sentence without numbered steps
$ARGUMENTS interpolated unquoted into `npx designlang theme-swap $ARGUMENTS`; shell metacharacters in user input allow arbitrary command execution
Command declares no allowed-tools frontmatter field; any tool may be invoked without declared scope
postinstall script runs `npx playwright install chromium --with-deps` automatically on npm install; --with-deps triggers OS-level system package installation and may invoke sudo on Linux
@modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency uses caret range ^1.29.0 allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades without explicit review
chalk dependency uses caret range ^5.3.0 allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades without explicit review
commander dependency uses caret range ^12.0.0 allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades without explicit review
ora dependency uses caret range ^8.0.0 allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades without explicit review
playwright dependency uses caret range ^1.42.0 allowing automatic minor/patch upgrades without explicit review
git clone from hardcoded external GitHub fork URL at developer setup time; if the fork is compromised, arbitrary code is pulled and installed
`npm install --no-audit` suppresses npm's built-in security advisory check, hiding known vulnerable transitive dependencies
"key findings" — "key" is a vague quantifier; does not specify which findings are mandatory or how to rank them
"notable design decisions" — "notable" is a vague quantifier giving no selection criterion
"relevant guide" in included AGENTS.md — "relevant" is a vague quantifier that does not indicate which guide to read for which task
